channel.title: Posts on Fabio Concina
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Fabio Concina
channel.copyright: © This post is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License，please give source if you likes to quote or reproduce.

item.title: Markdown Short
item.description: This is a short summary of markdown commands: Code (inline). Use single backticks around inline code: `import pandas` -> import pandas Code (block). Use triple backticks ``` around block code: import http.server import socketserver PORT = 8000 Handler = http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler with socketserver.TCPServer(("", PORT), Handler) as httpd: print("serving at port", PORT) httpd.serve_forever() Hint. On MacOS you can write a backtick pressing ALT + 9. Blockquotes. Use > for quotes: Clean and elegant quote.
